title: ComputerCraft Bronze
description: ComputerCraft re-textured, with shiny new bronze and steel.
body:
# ComputerCraft Bronze
A resource pack for [CC:Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked) giving updated textures, including a more pleasant bronze-coloured advanced set instead of the old bright gold.

_May not be fully compatible with the original [ComputerCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/computercraft)_

![An indoor brick-walled room with a TV set in the corner, a computer on a desk nearby, floppy disks scattered on the floor and various computer peripherals stacked behind the couch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8eaec9350cd08eae7bc4d7b6a2d182a4e90b3ce9.png)

- All block and item textures have been redone.
- Basic computers and devices are given a more steel-like colour pallete.
- Advanced computers have a bronze colour pallete, hence this pack's name.

![A basic Computer, an Advanced Computer, and a Command Computer placed next to each other. Below them is a basic Pocket Computer, an Advanced Pocket Computer, and a dyed Pocket Computer.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ab1e65052ab74a95264ef8635b8a6c5142682c0.png)
